mapper.select: SELECT id, symbol, name, asset_type, market, currency, sector, exchange, is_active FROM assets ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assets ( symbol, name, asset_type, market, currency, sector, exchange, is_active ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{name}, #{assetType}, #{market}, #{currency}, #{sector}, #{exchange}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE assets SET symbol = #{symbol}, name = #{name}, asset_type = #{assetType}, market = #{market}, currency = #{currency}, sector = #{sector}, exchange = #{exchange}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
